description_long: This wallet features a rectangular form with a beige exterior and a prominent woven fabric panel on both main faces, displaying a geometric diamond and cross pattern in black and cream. The wallet is bordered by smooth, stitched leather or faux leather trim, giving it a structured and refined appearance. A matching beige strap is attached vertically along one side, likely for carrying or securing the wallet. The top edge is fitted with a zipper closure, ensuring the contents are safely enclosed. The side views reveal a slim, tapered profile, indicating a compact and portable design. The overall aesthetic is both modern and artisanal, suitable for urban use and daily carry.
description: A beige wallet with a geometric woven fabric panel, leather trim, and a vertical carrying strap, featuring a zipper closure and a slim, structured profile.
description_view_0: Front view showing the woven geometric pattern panel, beige trim, and the vertical strap on the left side.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the slim, tapered profile and the edge of the zipper closure.
description_view_2: Back view with the same woven pattern and trim, but the vertical strap is now on the right side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the zipper edge.
attribute_decorative_pattern: Geometric diamond and cross pattern in black and cream on the woven fabric panel.
attribute_attachment_or_chain: Vertical beige strap attached to one side, likely fabric or leather.
